title: Iliad
notes: Homeric epic source for Trojan War characters

title: Odyssey
notes: Homeric epic source for Odysseus and related figures

title: Theogony
notes: Major source for divine genealogy

title: Works and Days
notes: Contains Pandora and Ages of Man material

title: The Histories
notes: Includes mythological and legendary references

title: Oresteia
notes: Agamemnon and related plays are treated separately in works.csv

title: Oedipus Rex
notes: Major source for Oedipus tradition

title: Antigone
notes: Major source for Antigone and Creon

title: Medea
notes: Major source for Medea tradition

title: The Bacchae
notes: Major source for Dionysus in Thebes

title: Argonautica
notes: Major source for Jason Medea and the Argonauts

title: Bibliotheca
notes: Systematic but attribution uncertain

title: Description of Greece
notes: Important for local myths cults and places

title: Metamorphoses
notes: Roman poetic retelling of Greek and Roman myths

title: Heroides
notes: Letters from mythological heroines

title: Aeneid
notes: Major Roman continuation of Trojan myth through Aeneas

title: Fabulae
notes: Useful mythological handbook but attribution and transmission are complicated

title: Astronomica
notes: Useful for constellation myths

title: Posthomerica
notes: Continues Trojan War material after the Iliad

title: Dionysiaca
notes: Major source for Dionysus traditions

title: Theoi Greek Mythology
notes: Useful for cross-checking characters sources and variants

title: Perseus Digital Library
notes: Useful for checking ancient text references

title: Internet Classics Archive
notes: Useful for public domain translations

title: World History Encyclopedia
notes: Useful for quick summaries and place context

title: Britannica
notes: Useful for basic author and character summaries
